title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates!
